name: filmtone-codex
description: Inspect Filmtone video folders, preview batch export plans, and run tracked Filmtone exports from Codex via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Batch grade-and-export Filmtone videos from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex inspect Filmtone-ready video folders, preview dry-run batch export plans, and execute long-running Filmtone exports with progress events. Requires Filmtone Desktop with the automation helper installed locally.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this video folder for Filmtone export.
Preview a Filmtone social batch job.
Summarize the last Filmtone batch job.
